name: Null-Lance
effect: Crystalline energy spear disrupting electronics on contact. Instantly disables vehicle and ship systems for 1 cycle. +25% damage vs mechanical units.

name: Arc Cannon
effect: Charged particle beam drawn from the planet's electromagnetic field. Ignores all shields. Full damage against shielded targets.

name: Verdict Pulse
effect: Wide-cone energy burst. +50% damage against Revenant and corrupted units. Standard damage against all others. Passes through cover.

name: Resonance Field
effect: Personal energy lattice absorbing the first hit of each engagement entirely. Recharges after 2 cycles out of combat.

name: Ancient Plate
effect: Pre-galactic alloy of unknown composition. Cannot be penetrated by standard munitions. +4 base defense. Cannot be destroyed, only disabled.

name: Stasis Sphere
effect: Freezes a single target in temporal stasis for 2 cycles. Target cannot act and cannot be damaged while frozen.

name: Dimensional Anchor
effect: Prevents Phase Blink, cloaking, and all teleport abilities in a 2-hex radius for 3 cycles. Counters Eternal Shards mechanics directly.

name: Void-Charged Rounds
effect: Ammunition infused with null-space energy. Bypasses all armor save values on a roll of 5+. Effective vs all target types.

name: Warden Network
effect: Links all Core Guardian units on the planet into shared awareness. +2 Defense for all units while active. Cannot be jammed or disrupted.
